name: Set up a recurring monthly service quote
description: User wants a recurring lawn-care arrangement billed monthly. The assistant should create a quote with a cadence indicator and surface it correctly on the dashboard and quotes pages.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Adding a new recurring HOA contract for a small townhome cluster.

steps.action: Types: 'Recurring monthly mow + edge for Maple Court HOA, $480/month, May–October.'
steps.expect: Assistant creates a quote with one line ($480.00) and metadata: cadence=monthly, season=May–Oct
The Maple Court quote shows a 'Monthly · May–Oct' badge or chip distinguishing it from one-off jobs
Active jobs / quotes count includes this; outstanding projection uses the recurring amount, not just the first month

evaluationCriteria.check: Recurring badge color/shape is consistent with other status indicators on /quotes
User doesn't have to think about 'how do I represent recurring?' — natural-language phrasing works
Cadence persists; loading the quote later shows monthly + season correctly without re-derivation
Badge text is a real text node, not an icon-only chip — screen readers announce 'Monthly, May to October'
